channel.title: Design on James Akl
channel.description: Recent content in Design on James Akl

item.title: CAD Model: MicroGuard Design
item.description: Renders | Drawings | Materials | GitHub Source files can be found in the GitHub repo. Description The project’s full title is: MicroGuard System: 3D Concept Model Examining Security via Intimidation This project is only a 3D visual concept model, not a fully-engineered system. The aim is security via deterrence, i.e., to de-escalate threats with intimidating appearance without the ability to actually shoot. Summary The system is designed and modeled fully from scratch.
